title: Conduct an animal welfare audit of a meat processing premises
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct an animal welfare audit of a meat processing premises demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify relevant animal welfare regulations and standards
